items.title: Bitcoin Is Rising While Bonds and Stocks Struggle—Here's Why
items.summary: Bitcoin is beating gold and stocks since the crisis began—and institutions are taking notice.

items.title: Is Bitcoin price at risk if private credit breaks?
items.summary: A looming private credit crisis risked triggering liquidity crunches that could initially suppress Bitcoin prices, but Fed interventions may ignite a major BTC rally.

items.title: JPMorgan Sued for Allegedly Enabling $328 Million Crypto 'Ponzi Scheme'
items.summary: The lawsuit claims JPMorgan Chase should have done more to prevent a customer from allegedly pulling off a massive crypto fraud.

items.title: Tether joins $5.2M round in stablecoin infrastructure builder Ark Labs
items.summary: The funding will support development of a programmable execution layer designed to enable faster issuance and settlement of digital assets on the network.

items.title: CFTC chair opens prediction markets rulemaking to public comment
items.summary: “This ends today,“ said CFTC Chair Michael Selig, who has been reiterating his position that the agency has exclusive jurisdiction overseeing prediction markets platforms.

items.summary: The bill including a CBDC ban still faces a winding road to becoming law, due to obstacles in the House and at the White House.
